title: Community Mapping During Operation Metro Surge
author: Amanda Hoffman
thumbnail_alt_text: Overview map of the state of Minnesota containing several point locations related to Operation Metro Surge reported incidents.
popup_alt_text: Overview map of the state of Minnesota containing several point locations related to Operation Metro Surge reported incidents.
description: A Storymap of Community Mapping During Operation Metro Surge: How communities documented, interpreted, and responded to unprecedented immigration enforcement activity in Minnesota.
